parameters: 真衣と軽く総括をする
エンド分岐の選択肢の時は暗転かな
本体は透明化ですり抜けが出来る状態で一緒に移動をする
配置の一つの例題：剣道ケースなし版
700.-30・・反転なのでｘ軸の拡大は-100
600.-30・・普通なので拡大は100のまま
以下は瞬きの配置で上記の例に合わせた数値である！
配置の一つの例題：どの衣装でも位置ずれはなし
700.-30・・反転なのでｘ軸の拡大は-100
600.-30・・普通なので拡大は100のまま
以下は瞬きの配置で上記の例に合わせた数値である！
背景画像：エンド選択前
感情アイコンの例：真衣の場合
"Ah~ The air outside feels so nostalgic!"
感情アイコンの例：莉緒の場合
"I'm sorry, Mai. I wish I could have helped a little bit
"Rio is not at all to blame! In fact, I can only express gratitude!"
"Besides, I was able to endure it because I believed that
Rio would definitely come to help me♪"
"Ahaha♪ Did you just get a little moved?"
"What are you talking about? I'm not moved or anything."
"Ahaha, I'll let it slide this time, okay?♪"
"What's wrong, Rio? Are you feeling so embarrassed that you've become
"No, that's not it. I'm just happy that I can have this kind
感情アイコン：ハート（大
"Hehe... I'm so happy that I can talk a lot with Rio
"Of course! Rio is someone very important to me, you know!"
"Hehe... Thank you. Mai is important to me too♪"
感情アイコン：はてな（大
"Ahaha♪ By the way, Rio. You seem to have become a little more
"I don't really understand, but I do have a sense of personal
growth from this incident, even if it's just a little."
"I see... So that's why I felt a slight increase in dignity."
"Hmm... The previous Rio was lovely, but the current
"――Well then. We've defeated the evil known as the principal and
maintained order in the school... It seems we'll be able to enjoy
"Yeah! Let's continue having fun and enjoying ourselves together, just
ここでエンディングの分岐の選択肢かな
適当な内容でそのままエンドCGへ移行
ノーマルとちょいエロノーマルエンド
